infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow ShegaReport to use your camera to take photos of water and sanitation issues.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow ShegaReport to access your photos to attach images to reports.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow ShegaReport to save photos to your library.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow ShegaReport to access your photos to attach images to water and sanitation issue reports.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow ShegaReport to use your camera to take photos of issues for better reporting.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow ShegaReport to use your location to pinpoint water and sanitation issues.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow ShegaReport to use your location to pinpoint water and sanitation issues.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow ShegaReport to use your location to pinpoint water and sanitation issues.
